entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop studied for production optimization in tropical environments

entities.name: CSM-CROPGRO-SOYBEAN
entities.description: A dynamic crop simulation model used to estimate yield and evaluate management practices for soybean

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of soybean production used to determine optimum management strategies

entities.name: TROPICS
entities.description: The general climatic region where soybean production strategies are being planned

entities.name: PHU PHA MAN DISTRICT
entities.description: A specific location in Thailand used for model evaluation and simulation of soybean management

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: The country where the soybean experiments and model application took place

entities.name: CHIANG MAI UNIVERSITY
entities.description: An institution where soybean experiments were conducted to determine cultivar coefficients and evaluate the model

entities.name: KHON KAEN UNIVERSITY
entities.description: An institution where soybean experiments were conducted to determine cultivar coefficients

entities.name: CULTIVAR COEFFICIENTS
entities.description: Model parameters specific to soybean cultivars used to simulate growth and development

entities.name: CM 60
entities.description: A specific soybean cultivar used to determine cultivar coefficients

entities.name: SJ 5
entities.description: A specific soybean cultivar used to determine cultivar coefficients

entities.name: SOIL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Information about soil series used as input for the CSM-CROPGRO-SOYBEAN model

entities.name: WEATHER DATA
entities.description: Historical climatic information used as input for the CSM-CROPGRO-SOYBEAN model

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of growth stages in soybean, used to evaluate model performance

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development of soybean plants, used to evaluate model performance

entities.name: PLANTING DATE
entities.description: A management practice evaluated to maximize soybean yield

entities.name: RAINFED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: A growing condition where water is supplied only by precipitation

entities.name: QUALITY IRRIGATION
entities.description: A growing condition where water is supplied via controlled irrigation systems

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A nutrient applied at planting to improve soybean yield

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area, evaluated for its effect on soybean yield

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: The broader geographic region where the CSM-CROPGRO-SOYBEAN model may be applicable
